summary: Comprehensive testing of P&D Module improvements: Formulação (Fornecedor field, Qtd/Lote, RN-PD-02), Ficha Técnica UI tab, and blocking tasks in status transitions. All 13 backend tests pass. UI verified with screenshots: formula table has all required columns, Ficha Técnica tab is present and functional, save/persist flow works, RN-PD-02 UI toast confirmed.

minor.issue: When building enriched items for PDF generation, the 'fornecedor' field from catalog overwrites the item's own stored fornecedor. For manually-entered ingredients without catalog_id: fornecedor is set to '' instead of the item's own value. Does NOT affect UI display (main detail endpoint returns raw items), but PDF generation loses manual fornecedor values.

ui_bugs.issue: canEdit is restricted to admin and gestor roles only: `authUser.role === 'admin' || authUser.role === 'gestor'`. This means formulador, qa, lider_pd, engenharia_produto roles CANNOT edit formula ingredients or Ficha Técnica fields via UI. The formulador is the primary P&D user and should likely have canEdit=true. Backend APIs work correctly for formulador, but UI disables all inputs.

issues: PDPage.js uses /crm/pd/cards endpoint (CRM pipeline view), not /pd/requests. So formulador sees 0 cards on the kanban even though 10+ P&D requests exist. This is expected architecture (two separate views) but formulador cannot navigate to P&D requests from the kanban. The route /pd/:id works directly when accessed by URL.

action_items: CRITICAL: Fix canEdit logic to include 'formulador' (and optionally 'lider_pd', 'qa') roles so they can edit formula ingredients and Ficha Técnica fields via UI. Currently only admin/gestor can edit via UI.

LOW: Fix _enrich_formula_items() at line 608 to use item's own fornecedor as fallback when catalog has no fornecedor: change `'fornecedor': catalog.get('fornecedor', '') if catalog else ''` to `'fornecedor': catalog.get('fornecedor', '') if catalog else item.get('fornecedor', '')`
INFO: formulador password is 'kuryos123' (from ROLE_USERS_PASSWORD env var), NOT 'admin123'. Update /app/memory/test_credentials.md to reflect correct password.
critical_code_review_comments: canEdit restricted to admin/gestor only (PDDetail.js line 95) - formulador cannot edit anything in P&D detail via UI
Formula item enrichment overwrites stored fornecedor with catalog value (pd_routes.py line 608) - affects PDF generation
RN-PD-02 backend validation is correct and thorough (checks no-dev, no-formula, no-items, total != 100%)
Ficha Técnica UI tab: all sections (Identificação, Análise 6 params, Formulação, Elaboração, Aprovação) render correctly
All new data-testid attributes added correctly (ft-field-*, ft-*-especificacao, ft-*-resultado, ficha-tecnica-tab)

success_rate.frontend: 85% (all features present and functional, but formulador canEdit restriction blocks UI editing)

test_credentials.formulador: formulador@kuryos.com / kuryos123 (NOT admin123 - uses ROLE_USERS_PASSWORD env var)

seed_data_creation: Created several TEST_ P&D requests during testing: TEST_RN_PD_02_Block, TEST_RN_PD_02_NoItems, TEST_RN_PD_02_BadPct. These are IN_PROGRESS status with auto-created developments.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Auth uses HttpOnly cookies - use requests.Session() for backend tests, not Authorization headers. Formulador password is 'kuryos123'. The main P&D detail URL is /pd/{id} which uses /pd/requests/{id}/full endpoint. canEdit in PDDetail.js is restricted to admin/gestor - formulador cannot edit UI fields. Test card IDs created: 4f67861c (TEST_RN_PD_02_BadPct with 50% formula). Ficha Técnica data-testids: ft-field-{key} for identification fields, ft-{param}-especificacao and ft-{param}-resultado for analysis table.
rca_of_issue: canEdit bug RCA: PDDetail.js line 95 hardcodes role check to admin/gestor. Fix: add 'formulador', 'lider_pd', 'qa' to the allowed roles array for canEdit. Alternatively, use a permission array or backend-driven canEdit flag.
